title: ZeroShadow: Runtime CFI and Syscall Interception Evasion Mitigation
excerpt: A deep dive into building an execution-tracking engine that single-steps active threads, enforces dynamic memory boundaries, and closes TOCTOU windows during syscall interception.

title: dSBOM: Non-Invasive Runtime Software Bills of Materials via Kernel VFS Tracing
category: Systems Security, C++20, Linux Kernel, VFS, CycloneDX
excerpt: How the dSBOM-engine intercepts process hierarchies using ptrace(2) and the Linux kernel virtual filesystem (VFS) to generate zero-overhead, injection-free software bills of materials.
